# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept because the source presents concrete benchmark details and comparative evaluation substance.

## Why

This is not just generic commentary: it reports specific benchmark characteristics and measured properties such as problem counts, language coverage, solution size statistics, repository distribution notes, and source-attributed benchmark limitations. That makes it a disciplined comparative benchmark artifact with real empirical payload, suitable for institute intake.

## Limits
